name: Plats & Surveys
description: All County plats and surveys recorded before 2008 are linked in this dataset.

name: Audits
description: All County Audit reports filed with the County Clerk's office are available in this dataset.

name: Macoupin County - Payroll
description: Dataset that powers: http://payroll.macoupincountyil.gov/

name: Monthly Board Checkbook Summaries
description: The checkbook summaries located below are copies of the Claims and Officers report presented to and approved by the County Board each meeting. This means the reports run one month behind. For example, if you are looking for January 2012 information, you would have to check the February 2012 Claims and Officers Report. These reports have a variety of information on them. They include a monthly summary of expenses by line item, various revenue reports, salary information and beginning in December

name: Polling Places
description: A listing of each precinct's polling place with physical address.

name: Macoupin County: Open Expenditures Ledger
description: for http://checkbook.macoupincountyil.gov/

name: Lotus Wind Farm Permit Application & Public Hearing Documents
description: On April 10th, 2023, Lotus Wind submitted an application for a siting permit for a wind farm. This dataset includes links to the cover letter, application, and all appendixes for public inspection. A public hearing will be held before final action is taken by the Board.

name: County Contracts
description: This dataset includes links to all County Board approved contracts as well as any contracts Elected Officials or Department heads have opted to put online.

name: Resolutions
description: All resolutions adopted by the County Board are available in this dataset.

name: County Board Appointments
description: Numerous boards and districts have their membership approved by the County Board. This dataset includes a list of all appointments made by the County Board, which district they were appointed to as well as when their term expires.

name: Animal Control Monthly Board Reports
description: Starting in late 2008, the Animal Control Administrator submits a report to the County Board showing data such as the number of adoptions done each month or how many calls the administrator is called out on. This dataset includes links to copies of the pdf reports the Animal Control administrator submits to the Board. The previous month's data is provided in each month's report submitted to the Board.

name: Macoupin Mine Maps and Documents
description: All maps, permits, applications and various documents filed with the County Clerk's office from the Illinois Department of Natural Resources regarding mines in Macoupin County.

name: American Rescue Plan Funding Expenses

columns.name: Description
columns.description: This is a brief description of the project provided by the official or department head who made the request.

columns.name: Total Spent
columns.description: This is the amount that has been spent on the request so far.

description: In March 2021, Congress passed President Biden's American Rescue Plan, which included funding to local governments. As part of the law, Macoupin County will receive $8,713,121 in funding. The money can only be spent based on the rules from the U.S. Treasury Department. As of August 1, 2021, the main objectives for the funding is 1) Support urgent COVID-19 response efforts to continue to decrease spread of the virus and bring the pandemic under control, 2) Replace lost revenue for eligible state,

name: Military Discharges
description: In 2019, state law was changed to make any military discharge that had been recorded for more than 62 years available to the public. As a service to military members and their families, Macoupin County has this index of every discharge filed 62 years or longer available online. Anyone wishing to request a copy can find a request form at http://macoupincountyclerk.com/county_clerk_s_office/military_discharge_records.php. There is no charge for a copy of the record.

name: Vendor dataset
description: A listing of all vendors used by the County that are processed through the County Clerk and Treasurer offices.

name: Assumed Name Business Licenses
description: All businesses that apply for an assumed name business license will be listed in this dataset. It will be updated on a quarterly basis and has data going back to 1990.

columns.name: Role
columns.description: Position Legend:  Ad-Administrator; C-Conservator; D-Defendant; Ex-Executor; P-Plantiff; M-Minor; W-Witness; X-Deceased

name: Circuit Clerk Book A Index
description: Created by Macoupin County Archives volunteers, this index of cases from 1839-sometime in the 1840s. For a copy of a death certificate, please submit a request to the following Circuit Clerk Research P.O. Box 197 Carlinville, IL 62626 Requests can take 30-60 days to be fulfilled. Costs are 5 dollars.

name: Election Judge Tracker
description: Election judges are essential to ensuring that our elections are fair, and in doing so, maintain the traditions of our past and our hope for the future. In an effort to continue providing voters with unprecedented levels of transparency, County Clerk Pete Duncan is providing Macoupin County voters, for the first time, a weekly update on how many judges still need to confirm that they will be able to work on Election Day. The goal would be to see each column with '0' as all positions would be fil

name: Voter Registration and Turnout
description: A history of voter registration and turnout at each election from 1986 to 2018

name: County Ground Lease
description: The County leases some of the ground it owns for farm land or other purposes. Any current lease or lease started since 2002 is linked here. A yearly lease report is presented to the Board for review of yearly payments. Please look in the spring for the yearly lease reports.

name: Genealogy Death Index
description: This dataset provides an index of all death records on file in Macoupin County before 1916. Those looking for genealogy copies of death records can search this record by name and date of death. They can then order a genealogy copy online using the certified copy request self service site and checking the genealogy copy option. https://selfservice.macoupincountyil.gov/web/action/ACTIONGROUP239S1

name: Recorded Mortgages - 2015
description: Mortgages recorded with the Macoupin County Recorder of Deeds. Data covers 2015. All documents recorded under the document type 'MTG' are listed. Please visit http://macoupincountyil.gov/county_clerk_remote.htm for remote access to the full index of recorded documents and print copies.

name: Recorded Quit Claim Deeds - 2015
description: Quit Claim Deeds recorded with the Macoupin County Recorder of Deeds. Data covers 2015. All documents recorded under the document type 'QCD' are listed. Please visit http://macoupincountyil.gov/county_clerk_remote.htm for remote access to the full index of recorded documents and print copies.

name: Genealogy Marriage Index
description: This dataset provides an index of all marriage records on file in Macoupin County before 1916. Those looking for genealogy copies of marriage records can search this record by name and date of marriage. They can then order a genealogy copy online using the certified copy request self service site and checking the genealogy copy option. https://selfservice.macoupincountyil.gov/web/action/ACTIONGROUP239S1

name: Genealogy Birth Index
description: This dataset provides an index of all birth records on file in Macoupin County before 1916. Those looking for genealogy copies of birth records can search this record by name and date of birth. They can then order a genealogy copy online using the certified copy request self service site and checking the genealogy copy option. https://selfservice.macoupincountyil.gov/web/action/ACTIONGROUP239S1

name: Recorded Foreclosures - 2015
description: Foreclosures recorded with the Macoupin County Recorder of Deeds. Data covers 2015. All documents recorded under the document type 'LP' are listed. Please visit http://macoupincountyil.gov/county_clerk_remote.htm for remote access to the full index of recorded documents and print copies.

name: Early Voting by Day in General Elections 2008-2024
description: This dataset shows by day how many votes were cast early in person in each General Election from 2008 to 2024. The numbers show the running total for each election. To see how many voters voted on an individual day, subtract the previous days total to that day.

name: Early, Mail and Grace Period Voting
description: In 2006, Illinois started early voting before Election Day. Since then, more and more voters are voting early. This dataset includes stats of how many voters cast their ballot early, how many voted by mail, how many military voters voted, etc.

name: Party Ballots Pulled Per Primary
description: Every two years, voters must pull either a Democratic or Republican ballot. This dataset shows the number of voters pulling each party ballot going back to 1938.

name: US Alliance for Election Excellence Grant Expenditures
description: In late 2022, Macoupin County was selected as one of ten nationwide Centers for Election Excellence by the US Alliance for Election Excellence. As part of that distinction, we did receive a grant of $500,000. This was a set amount based off the number of registered voters in our county. The County can spend that money on the following items 1) Key Physical Components: Equipment and materials, facilities, and records, including voting locations, technical facilities, storage facilities, processin

name: Presidential Election Results And Turnout 1936-2016
description: This dataset shows the total turnout as well as the vote counts for the two major parties in Macoupin County from 1936 to 2016. The national winner is listed first in the Election field.

name: 30 Year Analysis Of Macoupin Voters Undervoting In Primary Elections
description: Any Election, there is under voting in which more people vote in one particular race than another. This dataset includes over 30 years of primary elections and shows a countywide race versus a statewide or congressional race and the total number of undervotes.

name: Midterm Election Turnout and Governor Results 1978-2018
description: This dataset shows the total turnout as well as the vote counts for the two major parties in Macoupin County from 1938 to 2018. The statewide winner is listed first in the Election field.

name: Total Vote By Day General Elections 2008 - 2022
Macoupin County Budget
description: Budget for 1997-2014.

name: Yearly Court Case Filing Statistics
description: A look at yearly number of case filings per court case types. Going back to 2006 and updated yearly.

name: layer_0
description: This data includes the GIS data for the 61 precincts in Macoupin County.

name: SchoolDistricts
description: This data includes the GIS data for the school districts in Macoupin County.

name: Early Voting by Day in Primary Elections 2008-2026
description: This dataset shows by day how many votes were cast early in person in each Primary Election from 2008 to 2026. The numbers show the running total for each election. The most recent election is in the first set of numbers. To see how many voters voted on an individual day, subtract the previous days total to that day.
